title: nf-core/pipeline pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

SampleID.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

AssemblyFASTA.errorMessage: Assembly FASTA must be provided and have extension .fa, .fna, .fasta, optionally with .gz

BUSCO_lineage.errorMessage: BUSCO lineage must be provided and cannot contain spaces

reads.description: Optional path to long-read FASTQ/FASTA file(s) used to build FastK k-mer databases for MerquryFK QC. Semicolon-separated for multiple files. Leave blank to skip MerquryFK.
reads.errorMessage: Optional reads path(s) for MerquryFK; semicolon-separated FASTQ/FASTA files, or leave blank

platform.description: Sequencing platform for reads. Required when reads are provided; defaults to --read_platform otherwise.
platform.errorMessage: Sequencing platform for reads; required when reads are provided
